summary.zh-CN: 本版本修复远程访问中的小应用加载，并改进 Agent 运行时辨识、模型选择交互和启动更新检查。
summary.en-US: This release fixes panel apps in remote access and improves Agent runtime identity, model selection, and startup update checks.

body.zh-CN: 通过远程访问打开会话中的小应用时，应用可以正常读取数据并执行操作。
body.en-US: Panel apps opened through remote access can load data and perform actions normally.

title.zh-CN: 模型选项面板保持打开

body.zh-CN: 重复点击当前模型输入框时，模型选项面板不再意外关闭。
body.en-US: Clicking an already-focused model input no longer closes its option panel unexpectedly.

title.zh-CN: Agent 运行时更容易辨认
title.en-US: Agent runtimes are easier to identify

body.zh-CN: 助手头像、会话侧栏和运行时选择器以一致的图标与提示展示当前运行时。
body.en-US: Assistant avatars, session sidebar entries, and runtime selectors use consistent icons and hints for the active runtime.

body.zh-CN: NextClaw 每次启动后立即检查一次可用更新，运行期间继续定期检查，但不会自动下载或应用。
body.en-US: NextClaw checks for updates after every start and periodically while running, without downloading or applying them automatically.

body.zh-CN: 本版本不需要迁移配置；升级并重启运行时后即可使用修复。
body.en-US: No configuration migration is required; upgrade and restart the runtime to use the fixes.
